basic_details.job_title: HLL T&D Trainees Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for SSLC, ITI and Graduate Trainees Posts
basic_details.short_information: The HLL Lifecare Limited (HLL) has officially announced the T&D Trainees Recruitment 2026 with multiple openings. The detailed notification has been released through the official HLL Lifecare recruitment portal. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 30 years and hold SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2 Pass, ITI (Pass), or B.Sc Physics/Chemistry (Pass) qualifications can participate in the walk-in selection process scheduled for 06-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and check the walk-in details are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: SSLC Trainees: SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2 Pass ITI Trainees: ITI (Pass) Graduate Trainees: B.Sc Physics / Chemistry (Pass)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for HLL T&D Trainees?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection test for SSLC Trainees is on 05-06-2026, and for ITI and Graduate Trainees, it is on 06-06-2026. Candidates should report before 11 am.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the T&D Trainees posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post. For SSLC Trainees, it's SSLC/VHSE/Plus 2 Pass. For ITI Trainees, it's ITI (Pass), and for Graduate Trainees, it's B.Sc Physics/Chemistry (Pass).

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to HLL T&D Trainees?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 18 to 30 years. Specific age relaxation details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the T&D Trainees?
faq.answer: The stipend ranges from Rs. 9000/- to Rs. 12500/- per month, depending on the year and qualification. Specific details are provided for each trainee category.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the HLL T&D Trainees positions?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in selection test. Candidates need to attend the test at the specified venue and time with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the walk-in selection test?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring attested photocopies of certificates, a passport-size photo, and an Aadhaar card (original and copy) to the walk-in selection test.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in selection test for HLL T&D Trainees being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in selection test will be held at HLL Lifecare Limited, Peroorkada, Kerala, 695505.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the HLL T&D Trainees recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these trainee positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Selection Test. Candidates are advised to report and register before 11 am.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with ITI qualification apply for these posts?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with an ITI (Pass) qualification are eligible to apply for the ITI Trainees post.
